Church & House of Worship Cleaning in New York City

Respectful, professional janitorial for churches, temples, mosques, and synagogues. Flexible scheduling around services and events. MBE-certified with JaniTrack-verified quality.

Schedule a Free Walkthrough → 347-332-9348
✓MBE / MWBE Certified
✓Flexible Scheduling
✓Non-Toxic Products
✓Background-Checked Teams

Houses of worship are more than buildings — they are sacred spaces where communities gather for prayer, celebration, and support. GreenPoint Maintenance Services provides professional janitorial programs designed around the unique rhythms of religious life: worship services, fellowship events, youth programs, weddings, funerals, and holiday celebrations that can shift weekly.

Our teams understand the care required for sanctuaries, pews, altars, fellowship halls, nurseries, and multipurpose spaces that serve different functions throughout the week. We use non-toxic, pH-neutral products safe for wood, fabric, stained glass surroundings, and delicate fixtures. Every visit is documented through JaniTrack with timestamped photos and ATP bioluminescence testing — giving your board and congregation measurable proof of cleanliness.

As a certified Minority Business Enterprise, GreenPoint provides the insurance documentation, fixed pricing, and accountability that church boards and religious institution finance committees require. We serve over 80 facilities across five states with dedicated teams assigned to your facility — the same crew every visit, building familiarity and trust with your staff and congregation.

Services Included

What's Included

Sanctuary & Worship Hall Care

Pew dusting and sanitization, altar area care, aisle vacuuming, foyer maintenance, and careful treatment of religious furnishings and sacred items.

Fellowship Hall Turnaround

Same-day event setup and teardown cleaning for weddings, funerals, potlucks, fundraisers, and community gatherings. Reset between back-to-back events.

Nursery & Classroom Sanitization

Non-toxic, child-safe sanitization for nurseries, Sunday school rooms, and youth activity areas. Surface disinfection and toy sanitization included.

Restroom & Kitchen Disinfection

High-traffic restroom service with ATP verification. Kitchen and food prep area cleaning for fellowship meals and community programs.

Floor Care & Restoration

Carpet extraction for high-traffic aisles, VCT and tile maintenance for fellowship halls, marble and stone care for lobbies and sanctuaries.

Facility Maintenance

Light plumbing, electrical, painting, and general repairs. One provider for both cleaning and building upkeep — simplified budgeting for church finance teams.

Why GreenPoint

Why Facility Managers Choose GreenPoint

Sacred Space Expertise
Trained in the care of religious furnishings, altar areas, and sacred items. Non-toxic products safe for wood pews, fabric, and delicate fixtures.
JaniTrack Verification
Real-time photo documentation and ATP bioluminescence testing after every service. Board-ready reports accessible through a live dashboard.
MBE Certified & Insured
$2M+ commercial general liability, workers' comp, bonded. W-9, COI, and references available for board approval within one business day.
Dedicated Teams
Same background-checked personnel every visit. Your team learns your facility, your schedule, and your congregation's expectations.
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Absolutely. We build schedules around your worship calendar — services, studies, rehearsals, youth programs, and events. Early morning, evening, weekend, and holiday options available.

Sanctuaries, fellowship halls, nurseries, classrooms, offices, restrooms, kitchens, lobbies, and outdoor entryways. Each area gets a customized protocol based on use and traffic.

Yes — same-day turnaround for weddings, funerals, holiday services, and community events. We reset fellowship halls and sanctuaries between back-to-back gatherings.

We use non-toxic, pH-neutral products safe for wood pews, fabric, stained glass surroundings, marble, and delicate fixtures. Our team is trained in religious furnishing care.

Fixed-price proposals, W-9, Certificate of Insurance, references, and ongoing JaniTrack verification reports. Everything a finance committee needs for vendor approval.

Get Started

Schedule a Free Walkthrough for Your House of Worship

We'll assess your facility, build a cleaning program around your worship calendar, and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours. No obligation.
